area.value: one willing animal of Small, Medium, Large, or Huge size

description.value: This spell functions like reduce person, except that it affects a single willing animal. Reduce the damage dealt by the animal’s natural attacks as appropriate for its new size (see Table: Tiny and Large Weapon Damage to adjust damage for size).
